新款Peloton Bike+包括23.8英寸旋转、高清分辨率触摸屏。它可以向任何一个方向移动180度，这是为了让在家锻炼的人在离开自行车时使用屏幕(以及佩洛顿的一系列远程锻炼指导和课程)。还有一个内置的四扬声器音响系统，与苹果健身房的一键非接触式集成，让你可以将锻炼与你的Apple Watch同步，还有一个自动跟随阻力系统，可以根据你自己的心率和呼吸目标指标调整自行车的阻力。
如前所述，Bike+的零售价为2495美元，比新重新定价的入门级自行车高出约600美元。它将于9月9日开始在美国、加拿大和德国销售，并将在分期付款的融资计划中提供。Peloton还将在30天的家庭试验基础上提供它，就像它在现有设备上所做的那样。
同样，新胎面将能够在一段融资期内分期付款购买，并附带试用期。它将于2021年初在美国和加拿大推出，但将于2020年12月26日在英国稍早上市。据该公司称，德国也将获得新的跑步机，但那将是在2021年晚些时候。
至于胎面提供了什么，它也有一个23.8英寸的高清触摸屏，但它不会旋转-它可以上下倾斜50度进行地面锻炼。据该公司称，新踏板“比大多数沙发都小”，高68“L x 33”W x 62“H。它看起来像是一个比更高级的踏板+上的更传统的跑步机腰带组件，但该公司指出，它没有任何你会在大多数跑步机上找到的前裹尸布外壳，这确实会减轻整个东西的外观。
佩洛顿还宣布了一种名为“自行车训练营”的新课程，其中包括力量训练，以提供更全面的全身锻炼，以及有氧运动。听起来像是对Bike+上旋转展示的完美补充，以防该公司不清楚是否想成为全面家庭锻炼计划的一站式商店。
佩洛顿说，如果最近的任何佩洛顿购买者对新装备感到后悔，“它会自动退还仍处于30天家庭试用期或仍在等待自行车交付的任何人，以便立即向他们提供他们为最初的健身自行车设定的350美元的降价。”属于这一组的任何人如果想要更换升级的型号，也可以在支付差额的同时做到这一点。
与此同时，如果你不是最近的购买者，但仍然想要一些新装备，佩洛顿正在向现有的自行车车主提供折价优惠，将为他们提供700美元的回扣，以及一套瑜伽和运动辅助设备，以及在他们交付你的新自行车时免费领取你的旧自行车。这是个不错的升级奖励。
note_en:
The new Peloton Bike+ includes a 23.8″ rotating, HD resolution touchscreen display. It can move 180 degrees in either direction, which is meant to allow at-home exercisers to use the screen (and Peloton’s range of remote workout instruction and classes) while they’re off the bike. There’s also a built-in four-speaker sound system, a one-tap contactless integration with  Apple   Gymkit that allows you to sync workouts to your Apple Watch, and an Auto-Follow resistance system that scales the resistance of the bike depending on your own target metrics for heart rate and breathing.
   As mentioned, the Bike+ retails for $2,495, which is around $600 more than the newly repriced entry-level Bike. It’s going on sale in the U.S., Canada and Germany starting on September 9, and will be available on a financing plan for instalment payments. Peloton will also make it available on a 30-day home trial basis, as it does on its existing equipment.
 Likewise the new Tread will be able to be bought over a financing period with instalment payments, and comes with the trial period. It’s set to launch in early 2021 in both the U.S. and Canada, but will go on sale a bit earlier in the UK on December 26, 2020. Germany will also get the new treadmill, but that’ll be later in 2021, according o the company.
  As for what the Tread provides, it also has a 23.8″ HD touchscreen, but it doesn’t rotate – it does tilt up and down 50 degrees for floor-based workouts, however. The new Tread is “smaller than most couches” according to the company, at 68″ L x 33″ W x 62″ H. It looks like a much more traditional treadmill belt assembly than the one found on the more premium Tread+, but the company points out that it doesn’t have any kind of front shroud housing like you’d find on most treadmills, which does lighten the look of the whole thing.
 Peloton also announced a new kind of class called ‘Bike Bootcamp’ that includes strength training to provide a more comprehensive total body workout, alongside cardio exercises. Sounds like the perfect complement to that rotating display on the Bike+, in case it wasn’t clear that the company wants to be the one-stop shop for a holistic home exercise program.
 In case any recent Peloton purchasers were feeling buyer’s remorse about the new gear, Peloton says that’ it’s automatically refunding anyone who are still in their 30-day home trial period, or who are still waiting for the Bike to be delivered, in order to instantly provide them the $350 price drop that they’ve instituted for the original exercise bike. Anyone who falls in that group and wants to swap for the upgraded model will also be able to do that while paying the difference.
  Meanwhile, if you’re not a recent purchaser but still would like some new gear, Peloton is extending a trade-in offer to current Bike owners that will provide them a $700 rebate, along with a Yoga & Training accessory equipment set, and free pick-up of your old bike when they deliver your new one. Not a bad upgrade incentive.
title: Peloton推出新的Bike+和Trad智能家居健身房设备，均为2495美元
title_en: Peloton launches new Bike+ and Tread smart home gym equipment, both at $2,495

作为这一过程的一部分，谷歌今天还将为这两项服务推出一系列新功能。例如，该公司正在推出一个新的API Gateway的测试版，它建立在开源的特使项目之上。这是一个完全托管的服务，意思是让开发人员更容易在Google的云计算服务和无服务器产品(如Cloud Functions和Cloud Run)中保护和管理他们的API。新的网关已经进入alpha阶段有一段时间了，它提供了你所期望的所有标准功能，包括身份验证、密钥验证和速率限制。
至于它的低码服务AppSheet，Google Cloud团队现在可以更容易地从第三方应用程序中获取数据，这要归功于Apigee作为该服务的数据源的普遍可用性。AppSheet已经支持MySQL、Salesforce和G Suite等标准源，但这一新功能为服务增加了很大的灵活性。
更多的数据带来了更多的复杂性，因此AppSheet今天也推出了新的工具，用于在服务内部实现流程自动化，这要归功于AppSheet Automation的提前推出。与AppSheet的其余部分一样，这里的承诺是开发人员不必编写任何代码。取而代之的是，AppSheet Automation提供了一个可视化界面，根据Google的说法，该界面“提供基于自然语言输入的上下文建议”。
谷歌在今天的公告中指出：“我们相信，新类别的业务应用平台将帮助技术和业务线开发人员获得创建和扩展应用程序、构建和自动化工作流程以及连接和现代化应用程序的核心能力。”事实上，这看起来是将AppSheet的无代码环境与Apigee的强大功能相结合的一种聪明方式。
note_en:
As part of this process, Google is also launching a number of new features for both services today. The company is launching the beta of a new  API Gateway, built on top of the open-source Envoy project, for example. This is a fully-managed service that is meant o makes it easier for developers to secure and manage their API across Google’s cloud computing services and serverless offerings like Cloud Functions and Cloud Run. The new gateway, which has been in alpha for a while now, offers all the standard features you’d expect, including authentication, key validation and rate limiting.
 As for its low-code service  AppSheet,   the Google Cloud team is now making it easier to bring in data from third-party applications thanks to the general availability to Apigee as a data source for the service. AppSheet already supported standard sources like  MySQL,   Salesforce and G Suite, but this new feature adds a lot of flexibility to the service.
  With more data comes more complexity, so AppSheet is also launching new tools for automating processes inside the service today, thanks to the early access launch of AppSheet Automation. Like the rest of AppSheet, the promise here is that developers won’t have to write any code. Instead, AppSheet Automation provides a visual interface, that according to Google, “ provides contextual suggestions based on natural language inputs.”
 “We are confident the new category of business application platforms will help empower both technical and line of business developers with the core ability to create and extend applications, build and automate workflows, and connect and modernize applications,” Google notes in today’s announcement. And indeed, this looks like a smart way to combine the no-code environment of AppSheet with the power of  Apigee  .
title: 谷歌云推出基于Apigee和AppSheet的商业应用平台
title_en: Google Cloud launches its Business Application Platform based on Apigee and AppSheet

note:
Chef去年100%开源，每年从商业方面获得7000万美元的经常性收入(ARR)。不用说，Progress首席执行官约格什·古普塔(Yogesh Gupta)很高兴将公司纳入其中，不仅获得了这笔收入，还获得了一批高技能的员工、强大的开发人员社区和令人印象深刻的客户名单。
古普塔说，Chef符合他公司的收购理念。他在一份声明中说：“此次收购完全符合我们的增长战略，并满足了我们之前提出的要求：强大的经常性收入模式、补充我们业务的技术、忠诚的客户基础，以及利用我们的运营模式和基础设施更有效地运营业务的能力。”
Chef首席执行官巴里·克里斯特(Barry Crist)为被收购的公司提供了一个典型的论点，即Progress为公司未来的增长提供了一条更好的途径，同时向开源社区和客户传递了一个信息，即Progress将很好地管理这家初创公司的愿景。
克里斯特在一份声明中说：“对于Chef来说，此次收购是我们的下一个篇章，Progress将有助于增强我们的增长潜力，支持我们的开源愿景，并为我们的客户、合作伙伴、员工和社区提供更广泛的机会。”
Chef的客户名单当然令人印象深刻，包括Facebook、IBM和SAP等科技行业的中坚力量，以及诺德斯特龙(Nordstrom)、阿拉斯加航空(Alaska Airlines)和Capital One等非科技公司。
该公司成立于2008年，已筹集1.05亿美元。根据Crunchbase的数据。它自2015年以来就没有筹集过任何资金，当时它筹集了4000万美元的E系列资金，由DFJ Growth牵头。沿途的其他投资者包括Battery Ventures，Ignition Partners和Scale Venture Partners。
note_en:
Chef, which  went 100% open source last year, had annual recurring revenue (ARR) of $70 million from the commercial side of the house. Needless to say, Progress CEO Yogesh Gupta was happy to bring the company into the fold and gain not only that revenue, but a set of highly skilled employees, a strong developer community and an impressive customer list.
 Gupta said that Chef fits with his company’s acquisition philosophy. “This acquisition perfectly aligns with our growth strategy and meets the requirements that we’ve previously laid out: a strong recurring revenue model, technology that complements our business, a loyal customer base and the ability to leverage our operating model and infrastructure to run the business more efficiently,” he said in a statement.
  Chef CEO Barry Crist offered a typical argument for an acquired company, that  Progress   offered  a better path to future growth, while sending a message to the open source community and customers that Progress would be a good steward of the startup’s vision.
 “For Chef, this acquisition is our next chapter, and Progress will help enhance our growth potential, support our Open Source vision, and provide broader opportunities for our customers, partners, employees and community,” Crist said in a statement.
 Chef’s customer list is certainly impressive including tech industry stalwarts like Facebook, IBM and SAP, as well as non-tech companies like Nordstrom, Alaska Airlines and Capital One.
 The company was founded in 2008 and had raised $105 million. according to Crunchbase data. It hadn’t raised any funds since 2015 when it raised a $40 million Series E led by DFJ Growth. Other investors along the way included Battery Ventures, Ignition Partners and Scale Venture Partners.
title: Progress以2.2亿美元阻挠软件自动化平台Chef
title_en: Progress snags software automation platform Chef for $220M

note:
消息传出后，两家公司的股价都大幅上涨，尼古拉股价在盘前交易中上涨45%，通用汽车上涨11%。
这笔交易使通用汽车获得了尼古拉(Nikola)20亿美元的股份，尼古拉是最炙手可热的汽车初创企业之一。除了金融股权，将军还获得了尼古拉董事会的一个席位，以换取实物服务。
通用汽车首席执行官玛丽·巴拉(Mary Barra)表示，她认为这是部署通用汽车电池和燃料电池系统的另一条途径。
“我们正在扩大我们在多个大批量电动汽车细分市场的存在，同时扩大规模，以降低电池和燃料电池成本，提高盈利能力，”首席执行官巴拉说。“此外，将通用汽车的电气化技术解决方案应用于重型商用车，是实现我们对零排放未来愿景的又一重要步骤.”
该合作关系指定通用汽车为尼古拉即将推出的7/8级卡车的独家燃料电池供应商。
对于尼古拉来说，这笔交易为这家初创公司带来了一个重要的合作伙伴，因为它正在接近生产。通用汽车将“设计、验证、同质化和制造尼古拉獾”电动和燃料电池皮卡。通用汽车(General Motors)也将接管皮卡的制造。
尼古拉创始人兼执行主席特雷弗·米尔顿(Trevor Milton)在一份发布的声明中表示。通过联合起来，我们可以获得他们为我们所有项目提供的经过验证的部件，通用汽车公司的Ultium电池技术和一个数十亿美元的燃料电池项目即将投入生产。尼古拉立即获得了数十年的供应商和制造知识、经过验证和测试的可随时投入生产的电动汽车推进系统、世界一流的工程以及投资者的信心。最重要的是，通用汽车对尼古拉的成功有着既得利益。我们向利益相关者做出了三个承诺，现在提前兑现了三个承诺中的两个。这是一个多么激动人心的宣布。“。
这笔交易通过将制造职责转移给世界上最大的汽车制造商之一，使尼古拉能够更快地投放市场。反过来，这又能更快地将价值返还给尼古拉的投资者，而且风险可能更小。对于通用汽车来说，至少在纸面上，这家汽车制造商获得了一项具有严重势头的重要资产。
note_en:
Both companies’ shares jumped on the news, with Nikola trading up 45% and GM up 11% in pre-market trading.
 The deal nets GM a $2 billion stake in Nikola, one of the hottest vehicle startups. Along with the financial stake, the General gains one seat on Nikola’s board of directors in exchange for in-kind services.
  General Motors CEO Mary Barra said that she sees this as another path to deploy GM’s battery and fuel cell systems.
 “We are growing our presence in multiple high-volume EV segments while building scale to lower battery and fuel cell costs and increase profitability,” CEO Barra said. “In addition, applying General Motors’ electrified technology solutions to the heavy-duty class of commercial vehicles is another important step in fulfilling our vision of a zero-emissions future.”
 The partnership names GM as the exclusive fuel cell supplier for Nikola’s upcoming class 7/8 trucks.
 For Nikola, this deal nets the startup a significant partner as it moves closer to production. GM will “engineer, validate, homologate, and build the Nikola Badger” electric and fuel cell pickup. General Motors will also take over the manufacturing of the pickup.
 Nikola Founder and Executive Chairman Trevor Milton in a released statement. “By joining together, we get access to their validated parts for all of our programs, General Motors’ Ultium battery technology and a multi-billion dollar fuel cell program ready for production. Nikola immediately gets decades of supplier and manufacturing knowledge, validated and tested production-ready EV propulsion, world-class engineering, and investor confidence. Most importantly, General Motors has a vested interest to see Nikola succeed. We made three promises to our stakeholders and have now fulfilled two out of three promises ahead of schedule. What an exciting announcement.”
 The deal enables Nikola to hit the market faster by offloading the manufacturing duties to one of the world’s largest vehicle manufacturers. This, in turn, returns value to Nikola’s investors quicker, and with likely less risk. For GM, at least on paper, the automaker gains a significant asset that has serious momentum.
title: 通用汽车以20亿美元入股电动卡车初创公司尼古拉
title_en: General Motors takes $2 billion stake in electric truck startup Nikola

note:
9月1日，Epic Games在苹果应用商店发布了Citadel技术演示。这真的是一件无聊的事情-你只是以第一人称的视角在一个中世纪的小镇上走来走去，没有目标地欣赏风景-但这种平静的首次亮相标志着iOS、应用商店和Epic Games的一个重要时刻。它证明了开发者可以安装在智能手机上运行的巨大的、细节丰富的设置，并利用虚幻引擎3来实现这一点，虚幻引擎3与Xbox360和PS3时代一些最受欢迎的游戏使用的引擎是同一个引擎。
如果你想玩具有令人印象深刻的图形的手机游戏，你可以选择的设备突然变成了iPhone、iPad和iPod touch。直到将近两年半后的2013年，Citadel演示才进入Android。
Citadel的演示在当时是开创性的，它可能有助于启动将类似控制台的体验带到新生的移动游戏平台的趋势。当我第一次看到它的时候，我记得我立刻觉得我需要把我的HTC Droid Eris扔出窗外，转而买一部iPhone。
我最终在我当时受雇的小玩意店里用iPad试用了它，当你走进一座建筑时，看到尺寸和照明动态变化的高保真纹理令人震惊。甚至在某一点上也有反光。当时我在PC上玩过更好看的游戏，但一些关于被装进一个小设备的经历成为了一种神奇的概念证明，给我留下了影响，尽管在Citadel散步的乐趣已经失去了吸引力。
十年后，情况大不相同。目前，Epic Games和苹果正在进行一场备受瞩目的法律战，这可能会对双方关系的发展产生严重影响。事实上，苹果已经这么做了：苹果上周删除了Epic Games的开发者账号，禁止任何和所有iOS端和ipad用户重新下载ePic的游戏。
到目前为止，我们已经广泛地报道了这个案例，但快速而肮脏的时间表是，Etic想要绕过苹果的应用内购买规则，即每次购买收取30%的佣金。有争议的是，苹果只将几个必须缴纳这一税的应用程序列入了白名单，亚马逊就是其中之一。EPIC不是其中之一，所以它试图在没有苹果公司许可的情况下，通过苹果手机上的游戏直接销售堡垒之夜的游戏货币V-Bucks，从而将自己列入白名单-而且同样是为了打折。
这一违反苹果应用商店指导方针的行为促使苹果将堡垒之夜从应用商店中除名。EPIC随后起诉苹果，此案目前正在审理中，可能还会持续一段时间。最新消息是，堡垒之夜备受期待的新一季将漫威的角色世界融入到游戏中，iOS和MacOS用户无法获得这一季。Android上的玩家仍然可以通过直接从Etic下载文件的方式将游戏副载到他们的设备上，但即使是那些在他们的iOS设备上安装了游戏的玩家也不能安装更新。
所以，10年后的今天，我们来到了这里。对于EpicCitadel来说，这是一个奇怪的生日，这是一个直接为iOS独家的Infinity Blade系列铺平道路的演示(尽管这款游戏最初是一款Xbox Kinect游戏)。更间接的是，它为大量运行虚幻引擎的游戏打开了大门，包括大量来自游戏机和PC游戏的端口，比如BioShock和绝地求生，否则这些游戏可能永远不会进入iOS。Citadel标志着人们对手机作为游戏平台的看法出现了转折点。
如果你没有下载Citadel或任何Infinity Blade游戏，你就不能再在App Store上获得它们。不幸的是，他们被时间迷失了--至少，通过官方的方式。奇怪的是，EpicCitadel仍然可以在亚马逊应用商店的Fire平板电脑上买到。如果你没有这些，请在上面的视频中尽情享受演示2010年的辉煌吧。
note_en:
On  September 1st, 2010, Epic Games released its  Citadel tech demo in the Apple App Store. It was a boring thing to actually play — you simply walked around a medieval town in first-person perspective, taking in the sights with no objectives — but this calm debut marked a big moment for iOS, the App Store, and Epic Games. It proved that developers could fit gigantic, richly detailed set pieces running on a smartphone and do it while utilizing Unreal Engine 3, the same engine that powered some of the most popular games in the Xbox 360 and PS3 era of consoles.
 The devices of choice, if you wanted to get access to mobile games with impressive graphics, were suddenly just the iPhone, iPad, and iPod touch. The  Citadel demo didn’t come to Android  until almost two and a half years later in 2013.
 The  Citadel demo was groundbreaking at the time, and it possibly helped to kickstart the trend of bringing console-like experiences to the nascent mobile gaming platform. When I first saw it, I remember feeling like I immediately needed to throw my HTC Droid Eris out the window and buy an iPhone instead.
   I eventually got to try it out on an iPad at the gadget store where I was employed at the time, and it was stunning to see high-fidelity textures that had dimension and lighting that dynamically shifted when you walked into a building. There were even reflections at a certain point. I had played better-looking games on PC at that point, but something about the experience of being packed into a tiny device made for a magical proof of concept that left an impact on me, even as the fun of walking around  Citadel lost its appeal.
 Ten years later, things are very different. Right now, Epic Games and Apple are in the midst of a high-profile legal battle that will likely have a serious impact on their relationship moving forward. Actually, it already  has:  Apple removed Epic Games’ developer account last week, disabling any and all iOS and iPad users from redownloading Epic’s titles moving forward.
  We’ve covered this case extensively so far, but the quick and dirty timeline is that Epic wanted to side-step Apple’s in-app purchase rule that takes 30 percent of each purchase. Apple has controversially whitelisted only a few apps from having to pay this tax,  one being Amazon. Epic isn’t one of them, so it tried to whitelist itself from the tax by directly selling V-Bucks,  Fortnite’s in-game currency, through the game on the iPhone without Apple’s permission — and for a discount, no less.
    This violation of Apple’s App Store guidelines spurred Apple to remove  Fortnite from the App Store. Epic followed by suing Apple, and the case is currently in court and likely will be for some time. The latest news is that  Fortnite’s highly anticipated new season, which incorporates Marvel’s universe of characters into the game, isn’t available to iOS or macOS users. Players on Android can still sideload the game onto their devices by downloading files directly from Epic, but even those who had the game installed on their iOS devices can’t install the update.
  So, here we are, 10 years later. It’s a strange birthday for  Epic Citadel, a demo that directly paved the way for the iOS-exclusive  Infinity Blade series (though the game  was originally conceived as an Xbox Kinect game). More indirectly, it opened the door for a vast amount of games running Unreal Engine, including plenty of ports from console and PC games, like  BioShock and  PUBG, to come to iOS that otherwise might never have.  Citadel marked a turning point in the perception of phones as a gaming platform.
 If you didn’t download  Citadel or any of the  Infinity Blade games, you can no longer get them on the App Store.  They’re lost to time, unfortunately — at least, through official means. Oddly enough,  Epic Citadel is still available on the  Amazon App Store for Fire tablets. If you don’t have one of those, bask in the demo’s 2010 glory in the video above.
title: 十年前，Etic通过一个小演示帮助将iOS合法化为游戏平台
title_en: Ten Years Ago, Epic Helped To Legitimize iOS as a Gaming Platform With a Small Demo
